sec1_desc: Explore and establish campus imaging standards. By organizing pre-production parameters and post-production archiving standards, we aim to provide a stable technical reference and workflow guarantee for every high-quality visual recording.
sec2_desc: Through professional technical service capabilities, we establish collaborative mechanisms with multiple student organizations on campus, providing a comprehensive visual support network for complex campus events.
sec3_desc: With 5 years of campus photography service experience, we have accumulated rich standard documents and practical resources. We open source some of these resources for reference by other organizations on and off campus, working together to promote campus visual culture.
news_desc: Insights into global imaging technology frontiers and industry trends
